fact: Design system is Monochromatic Black & White. No color accents. Use shades of grey (Colors.grey.shade100 through .shade900), pure black (Colors.black), and pure white (Colors.white). This is a deliberate design decision — do NOT add colored buttons or accent colors.
UI aesthetic uses Material 3 with Poppins font and GlassCard widget for frosted-glass cards. GlassCard is the standard container widget — use it instead of Card() for feature cards.
Architecture is: Screen → Riverpod Provider → Repository (extends BaseRepository) → Supabase (cloud) + Isar (offline). Never skip layers. Screens never call Supabase directly.

12 user roles with role-based dashboards: super_admin, tenant_admin, principal, teacher, student, parent, accountant, librarian, transport_manager, hostel_warden, canteen_staff, receptionist. Each role has a dedicated dashboard screen and GoRouter redirect handles routing at app_router.dart:233-261.

Offline sync uses Isar for local storage. The models exist but sync logic is INCOMPLETE. Do not promise offline functionality until sync logic is implemented. Isar models: check lib/features/*/data/models/ for existing Isar annotations.

Scale: 32 feature modules, 88 screens, 27 repositories, 29 providers, 40 models, ~104 DB tables, 75+ routes. The app is large — always check existing files before creating new ones to avoid duplication.

Mixed model patterns: some use Freezed (with @freezed annotation and .freezed.dart generated files), most are plain Dart classes with fromJson/toJson. Prefer Freezed for new models — it provides copyWith, equality, and serialization.

No payment gateway integration yet. The fee/payment tables and Flutter screens exist but there is NO actual payment processor connected (no Razorpay, Stripe, etc.). PaymentGatewayScreen is a placeholder.
No localization setup. All strings are hardcoded in English. When building multi-language support, use Flutter's intl package and extract strings to ARB files.
AI features use `lib/core/services/ai_text_generator.dart` as the single service for all AI text generation (homework suggestions, report comments, etc.). Route all LLM calls through this service.

Entry point is `lib/main.dart`. Router is `lib/core/router/app_router.dart`. Theme is `lib/core/theme/app_theme.dart` + `app_colors.dart`. Shell with bottom nav is `lib/core/shell/main_shell.dart`. Always check these files before adding global features.

Multi-tenant SaaS: each school is a tenant. tenant_id comes from JWT appMetadata, set by Supabase Auth on login. The app is designed to serve multiple schools from a single deployment with complete data isolation.

Supabase migrations are in supabase/migrations/. Files 00001_*.sql through 00011_*.sql are the core schema. 20260209_*.sql are later additions. Always check existing migrations before creating new ones to avoid conflicts.
